act.title: The Echo
act.purpose: Add a short aftermath act if the project expands beyond the ten-minute ending.

screenplay.title: Basilica
screenplay.logline: In the last winter of Byzantium, a cannon founder sells his terrible invention and hears history answer.

acts.title: The Offer
acts.purpose: Open on the siege, then rewind to Urban's failed attempt to sell his work to Byzantium.

keyBeats.label: The walls shake under Urban's cannon.
keyBeats.description: The audience first meets Urban through the destructive consequence of his work.

keyBeats.label: Byzantium cannot pay.
keyBeats.description: Constantine and Notaras reject Urban because their empire is already starved.

acts.title: The Patron
acts.purpose: Urban enters Mehmed's world, where resources and ambition are abundant but moral distance collapses.

keyBeats.label: Urban crosses to Edirne.
keyBeats.description: He offers Mehmed a cannon large enough to batter walls that have resisted centuries.

keyBeats.label: The test shot succeeds.
keyBeats.description: Urban earns his patron and loses his plausible innocence.

acts.title: The Sound
acts.purpose: Return to the siege and force Urban to face the human meaning of his craft.

keyBeats.label: The bombard bursts.
keyBeats.description: Urban tries to correct a dangerous firing under pressure; the weapon destroys its maker.

acts.title: The Echo
acts.purpose: A newly added act can be referenced by key inside the same apply request.

keyBeats.label: The city remembers the sound.
keyBeats.description: The story looks past Urban to the historical echo of the weapon he made.
